data.title: Spirax Group NED Constance Baroudel to Become CEO of Spectris Limited While Remaining on Board
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Spirax Group ( (GB:SPX) ) has shared an announcement.

Spirax Group plc has announced that non-executive director Constance Baroudel will leave her role at Halma plc in August 2026 to become chief executive officer of Spectris Limited from 1 September 2026, while retaining her non-executive position on the Spirax Group board. The move underscores Spirax Group’s access to senior industrial leadership and may enhance board-level insight as the company pursues its strategy in net zero-enabling thermal energy and fluid technology solutions across global industrial markets.

Spirax Group continues to leverage its three aligned businesses to provide steam management, industrial electrification, and advanced fluid handling systems for mission-critical applications such as sterilisation, semiconductor manufacturing, and vaccine production. With over 30 manufacturing plants, a workforce of about 10,000, and FTSE 100 status, the group is positioned as a key player in the industrial transition to net zero and in supporting customers’ efficiency and sustainability goals worldwide.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SPX) stock is a Buy with a £8900.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Spirax Group stock, see the GB:SPX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SPX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SPX is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by financial performance: stable revenue and positive cash generation are tempered by multi-year margin/return compression and increased leverage. Technicals add caution due to a negative MACD and mixed moving-average setup, while valuation is constrained by a relatively high P/E despite a moderate dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SPX stock, click here.

More about Spirax Group

Spirax Group plc is a UK-headquartered engineering company focused on thermal energy and fluid technology solutions that support industrial efficiency, safety, and decarbonisation. Through its Steam Thermal Solutions, Electric Thermal Solutions, and Watson-Marlow Fluid Technology Solutions businesses, it serves critical sectors from food and healthcare to aviation, semiconductors, and biopharma across nearly 70 countries.

Average Trading Volume: 231,563

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £5.2B

On May 27, 2026, Chevron announced that R. He will continue serving as a non-executive senior advisor until his retirement, helping to support an orderly transition of Chevron’s top legal role and responsibilities, which is significant for continuity in the company’s governance and legal strategy.

data.title: BD Resumes ChloraPrep Shipments Amid Ongoing FDA Review
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Becton Dickinson ( (BDX) ) just unveiled an update.

On May 6, 2026, BD voluntarily placed its ChloraPrep and PurPrep antiseptic products on ship hold in the U.S. while it carried out additional final release testing, a move linked to an FDA Warning Letter issued for the company’s El Paso manufacturing facility. The company has since resumed shipments of ChloraPrep in the U.S., reporting that all added final release tests to date have been acceptable and that no patient safety signals have been identified, helping to safeguard continuity of patient care while it addresses regulatory concerns.

The shipment resumption suggests that immediate supply disruptions for ChloraPrep have been mitigated, reducing near-term operational risk for BD’s customers that rely on the product in clinical settings. However, the underlying FDA Warning Letter for the El Paso plant continues to represent a regulatory overhang, and investors and health care providers are likely to watch closely how BD manages compliance issues and any broader implications for its manufacturing network and product portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (BDX) stock is a Hold with a $161.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Becton Dickinson stock, see the BDX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BDX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BDX is a Neutral.

The score is driven by solid financial quality—especially strong free cash flow and improving leverage—plus supportive earnings-call guidance with raised adjusted EPS. These positives are tempered by weak technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD) and a less helpful valuation signal due to a negative P/E, alongside near-term operational headwinds (tariffs, China, and a temporary FDA-related shipment hold).

To see Spark’s full report on BDX stock, click here.

More about Becton Dickinson

Becton, Dickinson and Company is a global medical technology firm that develops and manufactures a broad range of medical supplies, devices, laboratory equipment and diagnostic products. The company focuses on supporting hospitals, clinics and other health care providers with tools that are critical to patient care and infection prevention in the U.S. and international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 2,827,647

data.title: CoStar Group to Acquire Zonda in $800 Million Deal
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

CoStar Group ( (CSGP) ) has issued an update.

On May 28, 2026, CoStar Group, through its subsidiary CoStar Realty Information, entered into a stock purchase agreement to acquire Zonda, a leading provider of new home construction data, homebuilder software, and residential real estate marketplaces, for $800 million in cash. Zonda serves more than 3,000 customers across the homebuilding ecosystem in North America and generates predominantly subscription-based revenue with strong margins and 104% net customer retention.

The transaction, announced publicly on May 29, 2026, is expected to close in the second half of 2026, subject to customary regulatory approvals and closing conditions, but does not require CoStar shareholder approval or financing. By adding Zonda’s proprietary lot-level data platform, its NewHomeSource and Livabl marketplaces, and its Envision visualization tools, CoStar aims to extend its leadership into the nearly $1 trillion U.S. new residential construction market, create cross-sell opportunities across its commercial and residential franchises, enhance digital marketing experiences with Matterport technology, and deliver an accretive contribution to adjusted earnings in the first full year after closing.

The most recent analyst rating on (CSGP) stock is a Buy with a $54.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CoStar Group stock, see the CSGP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CSGP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CSGP is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak technicals (clear downtrend) and very poor valuation support (extreme P/E). Financials are mixed: strong balance sheet and improving operating cash flow, but pressured profitability and low returns. Offsetting these, the latest earnings call was constructive with raised 2026 guidance, margin improvement expectations, and sizable share repurchase plans, though execution and bookings variability remain key watch items.

To see Spark’s full report on CSGP stock, click here.

More about CoStar Group

CoStar Group, Inc. is a global leader in commercial real estate information, analytics, online marketplaces, and 3D digital twin technology. The S&P 500 company operates major brands such as CoStar, LoopNet, Apartments.com, Homes.com, Domain, Matterport, STR, Ten-X, and OnTheMarket, serving commercial, residential, multifamily, and hospitality markets worldwide.

Headquartered in Arlington, Va., CoStar Group focuses on digitizing real estate, offering data, analytics, and marketplace solutions that attract over 131 million average monthly unique visitors as of the first quarter of 2026. Its platforms support property discovery, market intelligence, and transaction workflows for customers across the global real estate ecosystem.

Average Trading Volume: 6,882,028

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $13.2B

data.title: Keppel Infrastructure Trust Defends Portfolio Strategy as Distributable Income Climbs
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Keppel Infrastructure ( (SG:A7RU) ).

At its 2026 annual general meeting in Singapore, Keppel Infrastructure Trust’s management addressed unitholders’ questions on FY2025 performance, portfolio impairments and capital allocation, while underscoring that cash flow metrics, rather than accounting profit, remain the key measure of the trust’s health. Management highlighted a 24% year-on-year rise in distributable income to S$249.5 million, the contribution from recent acquisitions such as Keppel Marina East Desalination Plant and Global Marine Group, and balance sheet headroom with net gearing at about 39% to pursue further accretive deals.

The trust explained a S$38.5 million impairment at its Borkum Riffgrund 2 offshore wind asset as driven by unusually low North Sea wind speeds in early 2025, stressing that wind conditions have since normalised and that other European wind holdings did not warrant impairments. Executives also defended the medium-term prospects of Eco Management Korea, arguing that current lower landfill pricing is cyclical amid a weak Korean economy and that withholding landfill capacity now could enhance future returns when prices recover.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:A7RU) stock is a Buy with a S$0.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Keppel Infrastructure stock, see the SG:A7RU Stock Forecast page.

More about Keppel Infrastructure

Keppel Infrastructure Trust is a Singapore-listed infrastructure-focused business trust investing in energy, environmental services and other essential assets. Its diversified portfolio spans offshore and onshore renewables, water treatment and desalination, utilities and waste management, with an emphasis on stable, long-term cash flows and disciplined capital recycling to support distributions.

Average Trading Volume: 10,066,360

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$3.26B

data.description:

  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

An update from LSL Property Services ( (GB:LSL) ) is now available.

LSL Property Services has granted a new long-term incentive award to Group Chief Financial Officer David Tilak under its 2025 Long Term Incentive Plan, allocating him 14% of the total share-based award pool. The nil-cost options will vest in tranches in 2027 and 2029, subject to achieving specified compound annual growth in the company’s share price, tying executive remuneration more closely to shareholder value and long-term performance targets.

The award structure means the number of shares ultimately received will depend on LSL’s share price growth from January 2025 to each vesting date. This approach reinforces performance-based incentives for senior management and signals continued use of equity-linked compensation as a tool to align leadership interests with those of investors over the medium to long term.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:LSL) stock is a Buy with a £361.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on LSL Property Services stock, see the GB:LSL Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LSL is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving financial performance (revenue/profit and free cash flow recovery with moderate leverage), tempered by the business’s historical cyclicality and reduced equity buffer. Technicals are a headwind with the stock trading below key moving averages and a negative MACD, while valuation is supportive due to a reasonable P/E and a solid dividend yield.

data.title: Hong Kong Ferry Tightens Audit Committee Rules to Bolster Governance
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Hong Kong Ferry Holdings Co. Ltd. ( (HK:0050) ) just unveiled an update.

Hong Kong Ferry (Holdings) Company Limited has updated the terms of reference for its audit committee, effective 29 May 2026, reinforcing that the committee must comprise at least three non-executive directors, with a majority being independent and at least one possessing appropriate accounting or financial management expertise. The chairman must be an independent non-executive director, a former partner of the company’s current audit firm is barred from membership for two years after leaving the firm or its financial interests, and the company secretary will serve as committee secretary.

The revised framework formalizes meeting frequency, quorum and voting rules, requires at least two meetings a year, and mandates that the audit committee meet external auditors privately at least once annually while reporting to shareholders at the annual general meeting. It also clarifies the committee’s primary responsibility for recommending the appointment, reappointment, removal, remuneration and terms of engagement of the external auditor, and for overseeing auditor independence, audit effectiveness and the company’s relationship with its external auditors, strengthening overall corporate governance and investor oversight.

These changes underscore a tighter alignment with best practices in audit committee governance within Hong Kong’s listed company environment. By codifying independence requirements and structured engagement with auditors and shareholders, the company aims to bolster confidence in its financial reporting processes and internal controls, which may be viewed positively by regulators, investors and other stakeholders concerned with transparency and accountability.

More about Hong Kong Ferry Holdings Co. Ltd.

Hong Kong Ferry (Holdings) Company Limited is a Hong Kong-incorporated company listed under stock code 50. The group is overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors, and operates with formal board committees to support its governance and regulatory compliance obligations in the local market.

The company’s governance structure emphasizes clear separation of executive and non-executive oversight functions. It relies on specialized committees, including an audit committee composed primarily of independent non-executive directors, to supervise financial reporting, audit processes and internal control systems, reflecting a focus on sound corporate governance practices.

Average Trading Volume: 174,856

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$1.84B

For a thorough assessment of 0050 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: COSCO SHIPPING Ports Sets HKD 0.102 Second Interim Dividend With Scrip Option
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

COSCO SHIPPING Ports ( (HK:1199) ) has provided an announcement.

COSCO SHIPPING Ports has declared a second interim ordinary dividend of HKD 0.102 per share for the year ended 31 December 2025, offering shareholders a cash payout with an option to receive new shares instead. The default will be cash, with shareholders able to elect scrip at a conversion price of HKD 5.194 per share, subject to rounding down fractional entitlements.

Key timetable dates include an ex-dividend date of 8 April 2026, a record date of 16 April 2026, and a closing date for scrip elections on 16 June 2026 at 16:30. Share certificates for scrip shares and cash payments are scheduled for 30 June 2026, with trading in the new scrip shares to begin on 2 July 2026, providing investors with flexibility in how they realize the interim return.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1199) stock is a Hold with a HK$5.51 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on COSCO SHIPPING Ports stock, see the HK:1199 Stock Forecast page.

More about COSCO SHIPPING Ports

COSCO SHIPPING Ports Limited is a Hong Kong-listed port operator incorporated in Bermuda, focusing on investment, development and operation of container terminals and related port services. The company plays a significant role in regional and global maritime trade, providing infrastructure essential to international shipping and logistics networks.
